title: poa pratensis var. humilis
intro: Poa pratensis var. humilis, also known as the little meadow grass or dwarf meadow grass, is a low-growing variant of the common meadow grass, Poa pratensis. This plant is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Poa pratensis var. humilis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
